steps.title: State and support the claim
steps.content: The student needs a generalization about the Alta conflict plus evidence for it. The notes support the general claim that the conflict had a lasting impact through attention and legal protections.

steps.title: Check each option's role
steps.content: A gives only the protest details. B states a generalization but does not support it. C gives outcomes but not the broader generalization about the conflict. The remaining option gives the claim and its support together. The answer is D.
